200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, when the fighter’s health or that of an ally falls below 15%, restores 65000 health and increases the damage of his next two attacks by 25000.

description 4/6

Once in a while, when the fighter’s health or that of an ally falls below 15%, restores 75000 health and increases the damage of his next two attacks by 30000. Once in a while, when an enemy uses stun, removes the effects of stun from all allies and makes them immune to stun for 1,5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, when the fighter’s health or that of an ally falls below 15%, restores 100000 health ad increases the damage of his next two attacks by 60000. Once in a while, when an enemy uses stun, removes the effects of stun from all allies and makes them immune to stun for 2 sec. The fighter is immune to stuns. On death, casts shields on 3 allies with the least health. The shields’ durability equals 40% of the paladin’s health. Activates once per battle.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also deals physical damage to all enemies around the unit, equal to the healing received from the Paladin’s ability.

description 4/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also deals physical damage to all enemies around the unit, equal to the healing received from the Paladin’s ability. When an enemy uses stun, the damage of all allies is increased by 15% for 3 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also deals physical damage to all enemies around the unit, equal to the healing received from the Paladin’s ability. When an enemy uses stun, the damage of all allies is increased by 15% for 3 sec. When the shields cast after the Paladin’s death wear off, they explode and deal 150000 physical damage to all enemies in a small area around them.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also casts a shield on that unit that blocks 2 attacks.

description 4/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also casts a shield on that unit that blocks 2 attacks. When an enemy uses stun, this ability removes a random negative effect from all allies.

description 6/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, also casts a shield on that unit that blocks 2 attacks. When an enemy uses stun, this ability removes a random negative effect from all allies. Also once in a while, casts a shield that absorbs damage equal to 40% of the Paladin’s health on 3 allies with the lowest health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, their attacks start dealing additional damage based on the unit’s attack. The damage is critical.

description 4/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, their attacks start dealing additional damage based on the unit’s attack. The damage is critical. When an enemy uses stun, all allies also become immune to the stun.

description 6/6

Once in a while, when the health of the unit or an ally drops critically low, their attacks start dealing additional damage based on the unit’s attack. The damage is critical. When an enemy uses stun, all allies also become immune to the stun. On death, Paladin removes all negative effects from all allies. Activates once per battle.

Materials

Golden Lamp
Lazurite
